response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no familiarity with embedded networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.), and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven ability to work in cross-functional teams and build CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX systems as required
Zero evidence of Linux kernel analysis or modification skills
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement

key_factors.factor: Lack of network security tech exposure
